cases.name: eval_if_true_branch
argv: if true then return 'yes' else return 'no' end

cases.name: eval_if_false_branch
argv: if false then return 'yes' else return 'no' end

cases.name: eval_numeric_for_loop
argv: local sum = 0 for i = 1, 5 do sum = sum + i end return sum

cases.name: eval_pcall_success
argv: local ok, val = pcall(function() return 42 end) if ok then return val else return 0 end

expect.value: ERR wrong number of arguments for 'EVAL' command
ERR value is not an integer or out of range
NOSCRIPT No matching script. Please use EVAL.

cases.name: eval_while_loop
argv: local i = 0 while i < 5 do i = i + 1 end return i

cases.name: eval_repeat_until
argv: local i = 0 repeat i = i + 1 until i >= 3 return i

cases.name: eval_table_insert_and_return
argv: local t = {} for i = 1, 3 do t[i] = i * 10 end return t

cases.name: function_load_library
argv:
#!lua name=mylib
redis.register_function('myfunc', function(keys, args) return 'hello' end)

expect.value: ERR Number of keys can't be negative
ERR Number of keys can't be greater than number of args

cases.name: eval_comparison_less_than
argv: if 3 < 5 then return 1 else return 0 end

cases.name: eval_comparison_greater_equal
argv: if 5 >= 5 then return 1 else return 0 end

cases.name: eval_elseif
argv: local x = 2 if x == 1 then return 'one' elseif x == 2 then return 'two' else return 'other' end

cases.name: eval_function_definition
argv: local function double(n) return n * 2 end return double(21)

cases.name: eval_redis_pcall_success
argv: local ok, val = pcall(redis.call, 'SET', KEYS[1], 'pval') if ok then return 'ok' else return val end

cases.name: eval_not_operator
argv: if not false then return 1 else return 0 end

expect.value: ERR wrong number of arguments for 'EVAL' command
ERR wrong number of arguments for 'EVALSHA' command
ERR wrong number of arguments for 'EVALSHA' command

cases.name: eval_redis_call_with_keys_set
argv: redis.call('SET', KEYS[1], ARGV[1]) return redis.call('GET', KEYS[1])

cases.name: eval_pcall_catches_error
argv: local ok, err = pcall(error, 'boom') return err

cases.name: eval_string_find
argv: local s, e = string.find('hello world', 'world') return s

cases.name: eval_redis_pcall_catches_error
argv: local ok, err = pcall(function() return redis.call('NOSUCHCMD') end) return 'caught'

expect.value: ERR wrong number of arguments for 'SCRIPT' command

cases.name: eval_table_insert_at_position
eval_table_remove_last
eval_table_remove_at_position
eval_table_insert_then_sort
argv:
local t = {3, 1}
table.insert(t, 2)
table.sort(t)
return t[1] * 100 + t[2] * 10 + t[3]

cases.name: eval_table_sort_strings
eval_table_insert_multiple
argv:
local t = {}
table.insert(t, 'a')
table.insert(t, 'b')
table.insert(t, 'c')
return #t

cases.name: eval_table_sort_with_redis_data
argv:
redis.call('RPUSH', KEYS[1], '3', '1', '2')
local vals = redis.call('LRANGE', KEYS[1], 0, -1)
local nums = {}
for i, v in ipairs(vals) do nums[i] = tonumber(v) end
table.sort(nums)
return nums[1]

cases.name: eval_string_find_pattern
argv:
local s, e = string.find('hello123', '%d+')
return s

cases.name: eval_string_find_pattern_end
argv:
local s, e = string.find('hello123', '%d+')
return e

cases.name: eval_string_find_anchor_fail
argv:
local s = string.find('hello', '^ell')
if s then return s else return 0 end

cases.name: eval_string_gmatch_words
argv:
local t = {}
for w in string.gmatch('one two three', '%a+') do
  table.insert(t, w)
end
return #t

cases.name: eval_string_gmatch_first_word
argv:
local t = {}
for w in string.gmatch('one two three', '%a+') do
  table.insert(t, w)
end
return t[1]

cases.name: eval_table_sort_custom_comparator_desc
eval_table_sort_custom_comparator_strlen
eval_string_find_with_capture
argv:
local s, e, cap = string.find('hello123', '(%d+)')
return cap

cases.name: eval_string_match_multi_capture_first
argv:
local a, b = string.match('12-34', '(%d+)-(%d+)')
return a

cases.name: eval_string_gsub_returns_count
argv:
local s, n = string.gsub('aaa', 'a', 'b')
return n

cases.name: eval_string_gmatch_kv_pairs
argv:
local t = {}
for k, v in string.gmatch('a=1,b=2', '(%a+)=(%d+)') do
  t[k] = tonumber(v)
end
return t.a + t.b

cases.name: eval_xpcall_success
argv:
local ok, val = xpcall(function() return 42 end, function(e) return e end)
if ok then return val else return 0 end

cases.name: eval_xpcall_error_with_handler
argv:
local ok, val = xpcall(function() error('boom') end, function(e) return 'caught: ' .. tostring(e) end)
return val

cases.name: eval_math_modf_positive
argv:
local i, f = math.modf(3.75)
return i

cases.name: eval_math_modf_fractional
argv:
local i, f = math.modf(3.75)
return math.floor(f * 100)

cases.name: eval_math_modf_negative
argv:
local i, f = math.modf(-2.5)
return i

cases.name: eval_math_modf_whole
argv:
local i, f = math.modf(7.0)
return i

cases.name: eval_math_frexp_basic
argv:
local m, e = math.frexp(8)
return e

cases.name: eval_math_frexp_mantissa
argv:
local m, e = math.frexp(8)
return math.floor(m * 1000)

cases.name: eval_math_frexp_zero
argv:
local m, e = math.frexp(0)
return m + e

cases.name: eval_math_frexp_ldexp_roundtrip
argv:
local m, e = math.frexp(42)
return math.ldexp(m, e)

cases.name: eval_os_clock_non_negative
argv: if os.clock() >= 0 then return 1 else return 0 end

cases.name: eval_redis_replicate_commands_returns_true
argv:
local r = redis.replicate_commands()
if r then return 1 else return 0 end

cases.name: eval_table_maxn
eval_math_huge
argv: if math.huge > 999999999 then return 1 else return 0 end

cases.name: eval_ipairs_iteration
argv:
local sum = 0
for i, v in ipairs({10, 20, 30}) do sum = sum + v end
return sum

cases.name: eval_next_table_traversal
eval_unpack_basic
argv:
local a, b, c = unpack({10, 20, 30})
return a + b + c

expect.value: ERR wrong number of arguments for 'EVAL' command
NOSCRIPT No matching script. Please use EVAL.
ERR wrong number of arguments for 'EVALSHA' command
